title: Partition coefficients
summary: 9701 A Level partition coefficients — K_pc, solvent extraction, and like-dissolves-like with PhET molecule polarity.

simpleExplanation.title: Between two solvents
simpleExplanation.summary: At equilibrium, a solute distributes between immiscible solvents according to K_pc = concentration ratio.
steps: Temperature specified — K_pc changes with T.

sections.content: **Partition coefficients** (25.2) link **solubility** to **intermolecular forces**. Show **ratio setup** before substituting numbers.
